title: AE2 QoL Recipes
body:
A small mod that simply adds 311 cable related recipes to [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2). If you also get annoyed over having "useless" cables of the wrong type laying around, then this is the mod for you!

These recipes makes it possible to re-purpose all of the following cables:

* Glass Cables
* Covered Cables
* Dense Covered Cables
* Smart Cables
* Smart Dense Cables
